/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/token_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/git_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/mcp_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opencode.dir/src/prompt.cpp.o -o opencode  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
